value.found_quote: Run on your machine, in the [cloud](#run-long-running-tasks-remotely), or over [SSH](#ssh-sessions)... The integrated terminal lets you run commands alongside your session without switching to another app... [sending tasks from your phone](#sessions-from-dispatch)... Open it from the **Views** menu or press **Ctrl+\`** on macOS or Windows.
value.rationale: The page describes Claude Code as accessible via multiple surfaces: terminal (integrated terminal and CLI), IDE/desktop app (Claude Desktop with a Code tab), web (embedded browser preview), cloud (Remote/Anthropic-hosted cloud sessions), and mobile (Dispatch sessions from your phone). These collectively substantiate the claim about access surfaces including terminal, IDE, web, cloud, and mobile. The page is a documentation page for the Desktop application (which serves as the IDE-like surface), explicitly mentions the terminal-based CLI, cloud sessions, and phone-based Dispatch sessions.
